instructions: In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, combine the berry vodka, lychee liqueur, lemon juice, and raspberries. Shake for 20 seconds, then strain.

fennel-and-potato-hash.name: Fennel And Potato Hash

ingredients.prep: peeled, cut into 1/2- to 3/4-inch cubes, patted dry

instructions: Cut fennel into 1/2-inch cubes (there should be about 4 scant cups). Finely chop enough fennel fronds to measure 1/4 cup. Cook fennel in boiling salted water until just tender, 3 minutes. Drain; set aside.

Heat 2 tablespoons oil in heavy large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Add potatoes. Cook until golden and crisp, turning often, 20 to 25 minutes. Using potato masher, crush potatoes in skillet. Add fennel, salt, and pepper. Cook until fennel is golden, stirring often, 2 to 3 minutes. Add garlic and cook 2 minutes. Stir in parsley. Serve hot.

filipas-banana-muffins.name: Filipa’s Banana Muffins
instructions: 1Warm up the oven to 177°C (180°C) and line a muffin tray with paper muffin cases (or grease them with a bit of oil). Move the oven rack a notch down from the middle position.
Mash both bananas with a fork.
Combine the mashed up bananas with maple syrup or sugar and peanut butter in a medium-size bowl. Mix very well.
Add the dry ingredients and mix them well until there is no dry flour left.
Transfer the cake batter into the prepared muffin tray. Decorate the tops with slivered almonds (if using).
Bake for about 18 minutes, or until a toothpick comes out fairly clean.
Remove the muffins from the oven and allow them to cool down before eating.
Enjoy!

flank-steak-tacos-with-mango-avocado-sal.name: Flank Steak Tacos With Mango-avocado Salsa
instructions: Combine soy sauce, olive oil, lime juice, vinegar, garlic, salt, black pepper, white pepper, garlic powder, oregano, cayenne pepper, cumin, and paprika in a container. Place flank steak in the marinade and refrigerate for 8 to 24 hours.
Mix mango, avocado, lime juice, jalapeno, red onion, and cilantro together to make the salsa.
Set an oven rack at least 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler.
Remove flank steak from marinade and pat dry with paper towels.

Broil flank steak on high, flipping at the halfway mark, until steaks are beginning to firm and are hot and slightly pink in the center, about 18 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 54°C (54 degrees C).
Cut flank steak into small cubes. Wrap 8 tortillas in a paper towel and heat in the microwave until soft, 20 to 30 seconds. Serve steak on tortillas.

fluffy-orange-cake-with-whipped-cream-te.name: Fluffy Orange Cake With Whipped Cream
fluffy-orange-cake-with-whipped-cream-te.original_name: Bolo fofo de laranja com chantili
instructions: Throw the flour in a bowl. Apart, dissolve the yeast into warm milk and then add it to the flour.

Add the eggs, a pinch of salt and melted butter and knead very well. Cover with a cloth and let it leave till it doubles. Then lay the dough in a form, previously greased with butter and sprinkled with flour, and let it leave again. Take it to the oven, preheated at 160°C, for 40 minutes.
Light a pan with 500 g of sugar, water and orange peel and let it boil for 5 minutes.

Then add the liquor to the syrup, remove from the fire and reserve. Remove the cake from the oven, pinch it with a fork, water with the syrup and let it cool. In the meantime, beat the cream with the rest of the sugar until it's firm. Draw the cake, decorate it with the whipped cream and serve.

fluffy-strawberry-cake-in-the-oven-or-in.name: Fluffy Strawberry Cake In The Oven Or In An Airfryer
fluffy-strawberry-cake-in-the-oven-or-in.original_name: Bizcocho de fresa esponjoso al horno o en airfryer

ingredients.item: 1 medida de yogur de aceite de girasol (aprox. 100 ml)
3 medidas de yogur de harina (aprox. 210 g)
Mantequilla y harina para el molde

instructions: We purify the oven at 180 ° C with heat up and down, with no fan.
We washed and dried the strawberries well. We cut them into small daditos and put a few to decorate above before baking.
In a big bowl, we beat our eggs with sugar till the mixture is sparkling.
We add the yogurt and oil, and we continue to mix till it's homogenized. If we want, we'll add the vanilla.

We add strawberry pieces and mix them with care so that they don't break or get down to the bottom.

Horneamos durante unos 35-40 minutos, o hasta que al pinchar con un palillo salga limpio.
We get out of the oven, we leave to stand for 10 minutes and we clear onto a grid till it's completely cold.
We prepare the dough exactly as in the baked version: we beat eggs with sugar, we add yogurt, oil and vanilla, and then we put dry ingredients and strawberries into pieces.
We grease a small round or rectangular mold (about 18-20 cm) that fits into the frying basket. It's important that she's not too high to get the heat right into the centre.
Vertemos la mezcla y colocamos unas fresas por encima para decorar.
We purport the air fryer at 160 ° C for 5 minutes.
We put the mold into the basket and program at 160 ° C for 25-30 minutes. If we see that it's been tipsy up, we can cover it with aluminum paper for the last 10 minutes.)

forester-argiro.name: Forester

ingredients.item: 2 slides of bread or sale bread (150 g)
2 slides of bread or sale bread (150 g)

instructions: The traditional and very nutritious dick beverage (like dance soup) is always served hot on Thursday and Good Friday as a strong food.
Finely chop the sale bread or bread (remove the crust) and place it in a small pot.
Add the almonds.
Pour with the water and leave it on low heat for 15′ from the time the boat starts, until it thinks.
When the cold melts complete, remove from the heat, pour in all the other actives, mastic beaten, pinched nutmeg and minimum sugar or other sweetener for light sweetness.
We mash it in the blender while it's hot.
It has a rich creamy texture and we serve it warm as a meal in cups or glasses at room temperature every hour of the day.
It is tonic and has incredible aromas and flavor.

franks-and-beans.name: Franks And Beans

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large heavy pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, until softened, 5–8 minutes. Remove and discard casings from 2 sausages; add sausages to pot. Cook, breaking up with a spoon, until sausages and onions are lightly browned, about 5 minutes.

Add beans and wine to pot and cook until wine is reduced by half, 8–10 minutes. Using kitchen twine, tie parsley and thyme into a bundle; add to pot along with bay leaves and broth. Cook on medium-low heat, partially covered and stirring often, until liquid thickens, 40–50 minutes. Discard bundle and bay leaves. Mix in butter and 2 Tbsp. chopped herbs. Season with salt and pepper.

Meanwhile, after beans have been cooking for about 25 minutes, heat remaining 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook remaining sausages, turning occasionally, until browned and cooked through, 15–20 minutes. Slice.
Divide bean mixture among bowls. Top with sausage slices and remaining 1 Tbsp. chopped herbs.

frascatelli-with-pecorino-and-mustard-gr.name: Frascatelli With Pecorino And Mustard Greens

ingredients.prep: center ribs and stems removed, leaves torn into pieces (about 6 cups)

instructions: Spread semolina flour in an even layer in an 8x8x2-inch baking dish. Fill a small bowl with 1 cup water and set next to dish. Working in 4-5 batches, gather your fingertips and thumb of 1 hand together and, working quickly, dip into bowl of water, lift hand from bowl, and splatter water over semolina. Repeat several times until surface of semolina is dotted with ragged wet patches about the size of a nickel. Let stand until water is absorbed, forming individual dumplings, about 5 seconds. Using a fish spatula or slotted spoon, turn dumplings over to coat with semolina, then transfer to a sieve. Shake gently over same baking dish to remove excess semolina; transfer dumplings to a large rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining semolina and water until all of the water or all of the semolina has been used (there may be some water or semolina left over).

Working in 3-4 batches, cook dumplings in a large pot of slowly boiling salted water (if the water is boiling too rapidly, it may break up the dumplings), gently swirling water once or twice to prevent sticking, until al dente, about 30 seconds. Using a slotted spoon, transfer frascatelli to another large rimmed baking sheet.

Heat butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat until butter is foamy and browned bits form on the bottom of pan, about 2 minutes. Add cooked frascatelli and toss gently to coat. Add mustard greens and fold gently just to coat and slightly wilt the greens. Season to taste with salt and pepper and divide among bowls. Top frascatelli with grated Pecorino.

french-toast-argiro.name: French Toast

ingredients.item: 4 coarse slides of sale bread about 2 cm each
4 coarse slides of sale bread about 2 cm each

instructions: In a bowl, beat the eggs, milk, vanilla, cinnamon and salt with a wire and set aside.
Place the bread in a large refractionory vessel, which fits the bread and pour with the egg mixture.
Allow them to stand for 10 minutes and fuck the mixture.
Turn the slides over and allow 10 minutes to draw the liquid mixture.
Heat a pan over medium to low heat. Add some butter to melt.
Grab a slide, hold it a little to draw and place it in the pan.
Roll each egg yolk for 2-3′′ and turn over to brown on the other side.
Add some butter and continue with the rest in the same way.
Serve with honey and cinnamon or cinnamon. Put some butter on the hot eggplant to melt.
If we want, serve with fresh fruit.
These Sweet eggs are a wonderful choice for breakfast but also brunch. They become salty or sweet.

fried-chicken-sandwiches-with-slaw-and-s.name: Fried Chicken Sandwiches With Slaw And Spicy Mayo
instructions: Mix garlic, mayonnaise, and hot pepper sauce in a small bowl; cover and chill. Toss onion, jalapeño, cabbage, pickles, and pickle juice in a large bowl to combine; cover and chill.

Whisk flour, pepper, and 1/2 teaspoons salt in a shallow bowl. Pour buttermilk into another shallow bowl. Working with 1 piece at a time, dredge chicken in flour mixture, shaking off excess. Dip in buttermilk, allowing excess to drip back into bowl. Dredge again in flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Pour oil into a large heavy skillet to a depth of 1/2-inch. Prop deep-fry thermometer in oil so bulb is submerged. Heat over medium heat until thermometer registers 350°.
Fry chicken until golden brown and cooked through, about 3 minutes per side. Transfer to a wire rack set inside a baking sheet; season with salt.

Spread cut sides of rolls with butter. Heat another large skillet over medium heat. Working in batches, cook rolls buttered side down until browned and crisp, about 1 minute. Spread with spicy mayo. Build sandwiches with rolls, chicken, and cabbage slaw.

fried-mushrooms-argiro.name: Fried Mushroom s

fried-oysters-teleculinaria.name: Fried Oysters
instructions: Wash the oysters thoroughly, open them, remove them from the shells and dry them with absorbent paper. Also dry the shells and reserve.
Pass them first for flour, then for the beaten egg and finally for grated bread. Fry it in hot oil until it's brown. Remove them, pour them on absorbent paper and put them back in the shells.
Mix the lemon juice with the olive oil, stirring well with a wire rod. Season with salt, pepper and chopped parsley. Put this sauce on a sauce and serve with oysters.

frosted-pumpkin-bars.name: Frosted Pumpkin Bars
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Lightly grease a jelly roll pan.

Beat pumpkin, white sugar, vegetable oil, and eggs together in a large mixing bowl. Combine flour, baking powder, cinnamon, pumpkin pie spice, baking soda, and salt in a sifter; sift into the pumpkin mixture and mix well; pour into the prepared pan.
Bake in preheated oven until center springs back when lightly touched, 35 to 40 minutes. Cool completely before frosting.

Beat cream cheese and butter together in a bowl until smooth; add vanilla extract and beat. Gradually beat confectioners' sugar into the frosting, adding in small amounts and assuring each batch is incorporated before introducing the next. Spread over the pumpkin bars.

fuzzy-navel-slush.name: Fuzzy Navel Slush
instructions: Combine water and sugar in a large freezer container. Stir until sugar is dissolved.
Mix in peach schnapps, orange juice concentrate, and lemonade concentrate.
Cover and freeze for 4 hours or overnight.
Fill glasses 3/4 of the way full with slush, then top off with lemon-lime soda, and stir to serve.
